batchFulfill(uint256[],bytes).details: Batch fulfill multiple intents with a composite solution

params.intentIds: Array of intent IDs to fulfill

cancelIntent(uint256).details: Cancel an intent (only creator can cancel)

params.intentId: The ID of the intent to fulfill
params.solution: The solution/data for fulfilling the intent

getDepositIntent(uint256).details: Get a specific Nightfall deposit intent by ID

getIntent(uint256).details: Get a specific intent by ID

getOpenIntents(uint8).details: Get all open intents of a specific type

params.intentType: The type of intents to retrieve

markNightfallDeposited(uint256).details: Mark a Nightfall deposit intent as deposited Agent calls this after verifying the deposit proof off-chain

params.depositIntentId: The ID of the deposit intent to mark as complete

params.expiresAt: Unix timestamp when intent expires (0 = never expires)

returns._0: intentId The ID of the submitted intent

submitNightfallDeposit(uint256,uint256,b.details: Submit a Nightfall deposit intent User wants to make a private contribution via Nightfall

params.circleId: The circle ID to contribute to
params.salt: Random salt chosen by user for commitment hash

returns._0: depositIntentId The ID of the submitted Nightfall deposit intent
